name: POWER SOLUTIONS INTERNATIONAL, INC.
business: Power Solutions International, Inc. designs, engineers, manufactures, markets and sells a broad range of advanced, emission-certified engines and power systems powered by natural gas, propane, biofuels, gasoline, and diesel. Its products are used by global OEMs and end-user customers in standby and prime power generation, demand response, microgrid, combined heat and power, arbor, material handling, agricultural, construction, pumps, compressors, and utility vehicles, as well as in transportation applications such as trucks and buses.

exposures.sentence: growth in data centers and their increasing demand for electricity, which is driving growth for backup power (commercial generators/microgrids);
Due to increasing demand for new energy and latest market trends, the Company continues to offer battery packs for its industrial market.

heavy-duty engines provide a natural-gas-fueled power range from 500 kWe to 1.25 MW, allowing the Company to serve a greater portion of the demand response, microgrid, combined heat and power, and oil and gas markets.

The Company’s products are primarily used by global original equipment manufacturers (OEMs) and end-user customers across a wide range of applications and equipment that includes standby and prime power generation, demand response, microgrid, combined heat and power, arbor equipment, material handling (including forklifts), agricultural and turf, construction, pumps and irrigation, compressors and utility vehicles.
our reliance on information technology and the associated risk involving potential security lapses and/or cyber-attacks;

the worldwide growth of intermittent sources of energy, such as wind and solar, and an aged electric grid in the United States, coupled with power outage activity due to weather or power shutdowns, are driving increased demand for generators, microgrids and demand response equipment;
growth in e-commerce activity around the world, which is driving demand for last-mile delivery vehicles;
